nodes.label: get_current()
nodes.rationale: Primary entry point for all RayStation scripting. Called as get_current('Patient'), get_current('Case'), get_current('Plan'), get_current('BeamSet'), get_current('Examination'), get_current('PatientDB'), get_current('ui').

nodes.label: PatientDB.QueryPatientInfo()
nodes.rationale: Since v2025, UseIndexService defaults to True (was False). Queries now search secondary databases automatically. Affects QueryPatientInfo, QueryPhantomInfo, QueryPlanInfo, QueryCaseInfo, QueryExaminationInfo.

nodes.label: CopyGeometries() (v2025 API)
nodes.rationale: Replaces CopyRoiGeometries/CopyRoiGeometry. One call per source-target examination pair. Supports RoiNames list and PoiNames, ImageRegistrationName, UseAddedRigidRegistrationIfOneExists.

nodes.label: CreatePBSIonSegment() (v2025 API)
nodes.rationale: Replaces AddEnergyLayer and AddEnergyLayerWithSpots for ion PBS beams. Can add energy layers with arbitrary spot positions or rectangular grids. Signature must be obtained by recording in the Energy Layers tab.

nodes.label: RayWindow (v2025 GUI base class)
nodes.rationale: In v2025 CPython, GUI windows must inherit from RayWindow instead of IronPython Window. Requires calling super().__init__(). WPF/XAML loading via wpf.LoadComponent replaced by XAML-based approach.

nodes.label: CPython 3.11 (default interpreter v2024A+)
nodes.rationale: CPython 3.11 became default in RayStation 2024A. CPython 3.8 kept for backward compatibility. In 3.11, pythonnet upgraded to 3.0.2 requiring explicit type casts via raystation.clrify().

nodes.label: IronPython (no longer supported)
nodes.rationale: Scripts can no longer be executed in IronPython in v2025. Remove assert platform.python_implementation()=='IronPython'. .Count -> len(), .iteritems()/.iterkeys() -> .items()/.keys().

nodes.label: PyScriptObject (superclass)
nodes.rationale: In v2025, domain objects have real typed classes. PyScriptObject is still a superclass. Use isinstance(obj, PyScriptObject) not type(obj)==PyScriptObject.

nodes.label: numpy arrays (replace .NET arrays)
nodes.rationale: In CPython, DoseData and similar arrays are numpy arrays. Use .flatten() not .NET-style concatenation.

nodes.label: IndexService (v2025 default on)
nodes.rationale: Since v2025, UseIndexService=True by default in all query methods. Searches primary AND secondary databases. Previously had to be explicitly set to True to query secondary databases.
